6 MDS_ASMT_ID MDS_ASMT_ID Encrypted MDS Assessment Internal ID NUM 12 Unique identifier for a version of an assessment when combined with State ID.
7 MDS_ITM_SBST_CD MDS_ITM_SBST_CD Item Subset Code (ISC) CHAR 4 This column contains the item subset code and identifies the type of assessment that was submitted. This code is derived from the values submitted in A0310A, A0310B, A0310C,
